<span class="index-card-label">Provider</span>

Slang shader compilation provider — write shaders once, compile to GLSL, SPIR-V, or WGSL per backend.

## Features

- Cross-Backend Shaders
- GLSL Output
- SPIR-V Output
- WGSL Output
- WASM Support
